summary: Re-tested iteration 17 fix for the live-price validation bug on /registrera-fagel. The RegisterBird.jsx change (line 78-81 now reads `data.discount_code?.discount_percentage ?? data.discount_percentage`) works end-to-end. All 5 discount pricing scenarios pass. Regression on /admin/contact-messages passes. Rate-limit mechanism verified (429 fires) although exact 6th-attempt threshold could not be validated because the IP bucket was already saturated from prior runs (expected per task note).

tests_executed.observed: price-registration='300 kr', price-membership='100 kr', price-total='400 kr'

tests_executed.case: PARROTS15 -> valid banner + −45 kr + total 355 kr
tests_executed.observed: discount-status-valid='✓ Rabattkod giltig — 15% avdrag', price-discount='−45 kr', price-total='355 kr'

tests_executed.case: Clear discount -> back to 400 kr, price-discount row hidden
tests_executed.observed: price-total='400 kr', price-discount count=0, valid banner count=0
invalid banner='Rabattkoden finns inte', price-total='400 kr'
input value='PARROTS15', price-total='355 kr', valid banner present
72 data-testids rendered, tabs Alla/Nya/Lästa/Besvarade/Arkiverade all clickable

tests_executed.case: Regression: click message-<uuid> row -> message-detail-body visible

tests_executed.observed: Fresh email: attempt #1 -> 401, attempt #2 -> 429 (bucket already hit; likely IP-keyed and consumed by prior test iterations). Rate-limit IS enforced (429 returned); exact 6th-attempt threshold not verifiable in this environment. This matches task note explicitly.

critical_code_review_comments: RegisterBird.jsx line 78-81 fix is correctly defensive — supports both response shapes (data.discount_code.discount_percentage and legacy data.discount_percentage). Clean fallback.

Login route mismatch note: LOGIN path in app is /login (App.js line 44), not /logga-in. Task description referred to /logga-in — worth confirming intended URL for Swedish UX consistency, but this is a minor UX/i18n consideration and not a bug.
test_credentials: Admin: habib.nazary@hotmail.com / Jordgubbe234@u — verified working. Discount code PARROTS15 (15%) — verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 bug fully resolved. Live discount pricing works: PARROTS15 -> 355 kr, INVALID999 -> error banner, URL ?discount=PARROTS15 auto-fills. Login URL is /login (not /logga-in). Rate-limit is in-memory and IP-keyed, tends to already be saturated by earlier test runs. Admin contact-messages testids: `message-<uuid>` for row click (opens detail), `bulk-select-row-<uuid>` for the checkbox, `messages-status-tabs` for the tab bar, `message-detail-body` for opened message content.
rca of the issue: Original iter17 bug: backend POST /api/discount-codes/validate returns `{valid: true, discount_code: {discount_percentage: 15, ...}}` but RegisterBird.jsx read `data.discount_percentage` (undefined). Fix: read `data.discount_code?.discount_percentage ?? data.discount_percentage`. Verified: live UI shows 15% -> -45 kr -> 355 kr total.
